createdAt.description:
Date and time when the item was created.
Format: UTC, adheres to [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601), includes a [trailing Z offset](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Coordinated_Universal_Time_(UTC)).

createdBy.description: Contains information about the user who created the item.

type.description: Indicates the type of object returned. In this case, `type` returns `user`.

data.description: Contains text item data, such as the title, content, or description. For more information on the JSON properties, see [Data](https://developers.miro.com/reference/data).

content.description: The actual text (content) that appears in the text item.

geometry.description: Contains geometrical information about the item, such as its width or height.

height.description: Height of the item, in pixels.

rotation.description: Rotation angle of an item, in degrees, relative to the board. You can rotate items clockwise (right) and counterclockwise (left) by specifying positive and negative values, respectively.

width.description: Width of the item, in pixels.

modifiedAt.description:
Date and time when the item was last modified.
Format: UTC, adheres to [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601), includes a [trailing Z offset](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Coordinated_Universal_Time_(UTC)).

modifiedBy.description: Contains information about the user who last modified the item.

type.description: Indicates the type of object returned. In this case, `type` returns `user`.

parent.description: Contains information about the parent frame for the item.

id.description: Unique identifier (ID) of the parent frame for the item.

position.description: Contains location information about the item, such as its x coordinate, y coordinate, and the origin of the x and y coordinates.

origin.description:
Area of the item that is referenced by its x and y coordinates. For example, an item with a center origin will have its x and y coordinates point to its center. The center point of the board has x: 0 and y: 0 coordinates.
Currently, only one option is supported.

x.description:
X-axis coordinate of the location of the item on the board.
By default, all items have absolute positioning to the board, not the current viewport. Default: 0.
The center point of the board has `x: 0` and `y: 0` coordinates.

y.description:
Y-axis coordinate of the location of the item on the board.
By default, all items have absolute positioning to the board, not the current viewport. Default: 0.
The center point of the board has `x: 0` and `y: 0` coordinates.

type.description: Type of item that is returned.
